testsuite.name: Send a kudo from the web application

testcase.name: Submit a valid kudo and receive success feedback
testcase.classname: Send a kudo from the web application

testsuite.system-out: ?[1mScenario:?[22m Submit a valid kudo and receive success feedback ?[90m# classpath:features/send_kudo.feature:6?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mGiven ?[22mthe user opens SofkianOS landing page?[39m ?[90m# automation.stepdefinitions.KudoStepDefinitions.theUserOpensSofkianOSLandingPage()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mWhen ?[22mthe user navigates to the Kudos form?[39m ?[90m# automation.stepdefinitions.KudoStepDefinitions.theUserNavigatesToTheKudosForm()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mthe user fills the kudo form with:?[39m ?[90m# automation.stepdefinitions.KudoStepDefinitions.theUserFillsTheKudoFormWith(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable)?[39m | from | to | category | message | | Christopher Pallo | Santiago | Teamwork | Gracias por tu apoyo en la entrega del sprint | ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mAnd ?[22mthe user submits the kudo using the slider?[39m ?[90m# automation.stepdefinitions.KudoStepDefinitions.theUserSubmitsTheKudoUsingTheSlider()?[39m ?[32mâœ”?[39m ?[32m?[1mThen ?[22mthe user should see a successful kudo submission message?[39m ?[90m# automation.stepdefinitions.KudoStepDefinitions.theUserShouldSeeASuccessfulKudoSubmissionMessage()?[39m
